items.title: Bill Ackman tries again with plan for IPO of Pershing Square and a new fund
items.description: Hedge fund manager Bill Ackman is again trying to take his fund management company public alongside the launch of a new fund.

items.title: Scientists behind COVID-19 vaccine will depart BioNTech
items.description: The company’s co-founders said they are leaving to start a new mRNA-based company.

items.title: Return to the 2022 stock-market playbook as Iran conflict drags on, say these strategists
items.description: Barclays says the chasm between winning and losing stocks in 2022 when Russia invaded Ukraine was huge. Here are their style picks.

items.title: Saudi Aramco promises full production can be restored within days if Strait of Hormuz is reopened
items.description: Aramco’s CEO warns of “catastrophic consequences” for the oil market if the effective closure of the Straits Of Hormuz were to remain for an extended ...

items.title: Social Security is already the best antipoverty program we have — don’t make this radical change
items.description: Changing Social Security to a flat benefit for all would put both workers and the poor at risk.
